sectionHeading: built by people who study human development

credentials.label: developmental psychology
credentials.detail: grounded in how children actually develop

principles.heading: designed for development, not just engagement
principles.body: every tool in the reservoir is built on developmental science. we don't just make things fun — we design experiences that meet children exactly where they are and invite them to grow. age-appropriate challenge, emotional safety, and progressive depth are baked into every interaction.

principles.heading: play is the mechanism, not the reward
principles.body: we don't bolt play onto learning as a treat. play is how humans make sense of the world — it's the engine of connection, creativity, and resilience. our tools use play as the primary medium for growth, drawing on five years of research at the LEGO foundation and decades of facilitation practice.

principles.heading: evidence checks intuition
principles.body: good design starts with curiosity and gets validated by evidence. we weave real-time documentation and reflection into every experience, so educators and parents can see what's actually happening — not just what we hoped would happen.

bio.text: winded.vertigo is a learning design collective founded by garrett jaeger, phd — former evidence specialist at the LEGO foundation, educator, and developmental psychologist. we craft experiences where children inspire adults, ideas lead logistics, and evidence checks intuition.

hero.title: the reservoir
hero.subtitle: playful tools for connection, creativity, and growth — designed by developmental psychologists and learning scientists who believe play is how humans make sense of the world.

cta.heading: ready to play?
cta.body: pick a tool and start exploring. every experience is designed to be jumped into — no setup, no accounts, just play.
